zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"於1405年出生在德國薩辛德累斯頓時，她的父親Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg32歲，母親Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz33歲。她和Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1465年10月10日在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格伯林享年60歲，埋葬在德國貝也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"于1405年出生在德国薩辛德累斯頓时，她的父亲Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg32岁，母亲Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz33岁。她和Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1465年10月10日在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格伯林享年60岁，埋葬在德国貝也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" was born in 1405, in Dresden, Saxony, Germany, her father, Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg, was 32 and her mother, Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz, was 33. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg. She died on 10 October 1465, in Berlin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 60, and was buried in Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" est née en 1405, à Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1465, à Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" 1405 in Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg 32 und ihre Mutter Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz 33. Sie hatte mit Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1465 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" è nata il nel 1405 nel Dresden, Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg. Morì il 10 ottobre 1465, nel Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"が1405年にドイツサチセンドレスデンで生まれた時，父Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenbergは32歳，母Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitzは33歳であった。彼女はJohann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburgとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1465年10月10日にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ブランデンブルグバーリンで60歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg"(이)가 1405년 독일 작센 드레즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 10월 10일 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 브랜덴버그 벌린에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" nasceu em 1405, em Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1465, em Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" родилась в 1405 г. в местности дресден, сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg. Она умерла 10 октября 1465 г. в местности бирлинь, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara von Sachsen-Wittenberg "Prinzessin von Sachsen-Wittenberg" nació en 1405, en Dresden, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Rudolf III Von Saxe-Wittenberg Duke of Saxe-Wittenberg, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Prinzessin Barbara von Schlesien ,Prinzessin von Schlesien-Liegnitz, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Johann "der Alchimist" von Brandenburg. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1465, en Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Bayern, Alemania.
